channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump threatens to impose sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China on first day in office
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump threatened on Monday to impose sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China as soon as he takes office as part of his effort to crack down on illegal immigration and drugs.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Osprey ferrying White House staff in New York grounded due to safety issue, witness reports flames
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — An Osprey being used to ferry White House staff and government officials from an event in New York on Monday was grounded due to a safety concern, with one witness reporting flames under the right engine.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI and TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A voting machine firm suing Fox News now wants to probe Murdoch family trust fight
item.description: Lawyers for a voting machine company that's suing Fox News want to question Rupert Murdoch about his contentious efforts to change his family trust.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Peltz, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Special counsel moves to dismiss election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith asked a federal judge to dismiss the case accusing President-elect Donald Trump of plotting to overturn the 2020 election.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Donald Trump Jr. emerges as a political force of his own as he helps his father launch a second term
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — When Donald Trump, House Speaker Mike Johnson, Elon Musk and Robert F. Kennedy Jr. circled up aboard the president-elect’s plane over some McDonalds burgers and fries recently, Donald Trump Jr. was seated in the center of that power foursome.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: GOP senators squirm over sex-related allegations against Trump Cabinet picks
item.description: Republican senators are squirming over the rash of sexual misconduct allegations against President-elect Donald Trump's Cabinet picks, which they fear will become a focal point of Senate confirmation hearings next year.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: After Trump's Project 2025 denials, he is tapping its authors and influencers for key roles
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As a former and potentially future president, Donald Trump hailed what would become Project 2025 as a road map for “exactly what our movement will do” with another crack at the White House.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White House mostly mum after Trump victory
item.description: The White House has taken its show largely behind closed doors after Vice President Harris’s stinging defeat to Donald Trump. Harris has all but disappeared from the public eye, jetting off to Hawaii after a few scarce appearances around Washington following her massive loss on Nov. 5.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Dr. Oz's disputed health claims could jeopardize Senate confirmation
item.description: Oz's ties to online supplement brands and reported health misinformation could jeopardize his confirmation.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Soriano, NewsNation

item.title: Musk, Ramaswamy ‘DOGE’ confidence in Supreme Court may be tested
item.description: Musk and Ramaswamy will head a nongovernmental commission to dismantle government bureaucracy and cut costs.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, NewsNation

item.title: John Hopkins surgeon and COVID contrarian Marty Makary selected to lead Trump’s FDA
item.description: President-elect Trump has picked Marty Makary, a Johns Hopkins's surgeon who has espoused contrarian views about the COVID-19 pandemic, to lead the Federal Drug Administration. Makary is a surgical oncologist at Johns Hopkins University and an author.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation

item.title: Trump names Chavez-DeRemer for Labor secretary
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer (R-Ore.), to serve as Labor secretary in his new administration. Chavez-DeRemer had the backing of the Teamsters before she was officially picked by Trump.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: State GOP, Dems react to Trump selecting Pam Bondi to be next AG
item.description: Former Florida Attorney General and Temple Terrace native Pam Bondi has been selected to be President-elect Donald Trump’s next U.S. Attorney General.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Democrats rattled by postelection changes
item.description: The Democratic Party is grappling with the aftermath of its blowout loss in the presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Kellie Meyer, NewsNation

item.title: Gaetz withdrawal from AG nomination is among quickest in history
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) withdrew his nomination as President-elect Trump’s attorney general on Thursday, putting an end to a chaotic several days on Capitol Hill and making him one of the quickest in history to withdraw from Cabinet nominations.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Hennepin County looks to spread the word of Minnesota’s red flag law
item.description: Nearly a year after Minnesota’s red flag law took effect, the Hennepin County Attorney’s Office says it’s looking to expand information and training on how it works.
item.dc:creator: Estelle Timar-Wilcox, MPR News

item.title: Florida legislators won't have special session for condo concerns
item.description: Florida condo owners are facing a conundrum. Units for sale are sitting on the market longer and owners who want to stay are facing rising costs.
item.dc:creator: Mackenzie LaPorte, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Rays new stadium deal in play: Pinellas commissioner, St. Pete mayor
item.description: St. Petersburg resident and former Raymond James Executive Ron Diner is with the group No Home Run. They've been against a new Tampa Bay Rays stadium deal from the start.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Manhattan DA opposes Trump’s bid to dismiss hush money conviction
item.description: Manhattan prosecutors on Tuesday said they will oppose President-elect Trump’s demand to dismiss his New York criminal conviction following the election, instead floating the idea the judge could freeze the case until Trump leaves office.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, Fox 5

item.title: GOP senators reject replacing FBI background checks for Trump nominees
item.description: Senate Republicans are rejecting a proposal floated by some advisers to President-elect Trump to take the job of conducting background checks for high-level nominees away from the FBI and give it to private investigators.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Trump watches as Musk’s SpaceX launches Starship rocket
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is expected to attend the launch of a SpaceX rocket in Texas on Tuesday, sources familiar with the plans confirmed, in the latest sign of Trump’s closeness to the company's billionaire CEO Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump’s vows for revenge take on new seriousness
item.description: President-elect Trump’s vows to seek revenge have brought a renewed sense of alarm to those who have crossed ways with him now that he’s returning to the White House.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, Fox 5

item.title: Speaker Johnson becomes 'MAGA' Mike, cementing place in Trump's circle
item.description: Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) is cementing his place in President-elect Trump’s inner orbit, becoming not only a visible — if slightly out-of-place-looking — part of his entourage, but a key supporter of his no-holds-barred approach to his second term.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, WGN 9
